heading: Time for printing documents or reports which include illustrations or maps
label: 506 Time for printing documents or reports which include illustrations or maps
text: A document or report to be illustrated or accompanied by maps may not be printed by the Director of the Government Publishing Office until the illustrations or maps designed for it are ready for publication.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 115 (part) (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 8028 Stat. 621This section incorporates only the first clause of former section 115. The balance will be found in section 507 of the revision.
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
